title: ASSESSING FACTORS CONTRIBUTING TO INFLUENCE CHOLERA DISEASES SPREADING IN INTERNAL DISPLACEMENT PERSONS IN MOGADISHU, SOMALIA
author: Abdullahi Ahmed Hilowle
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The study aims to identify assessing factors contributing influence of cholera disease spreading in internal displacement persons in the Dharkenley district of Benadir Badbaado IDP camp. Methods: The sampling procedure used in this study is a Random cluster sampling procedure, particularly Purposive sampling used to select the sample.
steps_raw: The study aims to identify assessing factors contributing influence of cholera disease spreading in internal displacement persons in the Dharkenley district of Benadir Badbaado IDP camp. Methods: The sampling procedure used in this study is a Random cluster sampling procedure, particularly Purposive sampling used to select the sample.
keywords: ASSESSING, FACTORS, CONTRIBUTING, INFLUENCE, CHOLERA, DISEASES, SPREADING
